headline: 3 High-Yield Dividends Stocks To Buy Now And Forget About
summary: One of the best ways to keep your portfolio safe is with high-yielding stocks. Not only do they help generate passive income, but they also act as defensive, stable investments during times of massive volatility – as we’re seeing now. Look at dividend-focused ETFs like the Vanguard High Dividend Yield ETF (VYM), for example. Year to ... 3 High-Yield Dividends Stocks To Buy Now And Forget About

headline: W.P. Carey Announces Dividend Hike: Is the Increase Sustainable?
summary: WPC hikes its dividend to 93 cents per share, marking its seventh increase since resetting payouts in 2023 as it leans on stable leases and high occupancy.
